sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hun hoih hun nuam hong musak
Hun kilawm hong ngah sak
Hun manpha sung'h hong tonpih ka To
Zum leh hiam panin hong hem
Lau huaina pan hong keem
Cidam takin a minpha ka lo

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lungdam si'ng hih hunpha sungah
Ka Topa'n lam hong pi
Na sipha tawh hong naisak in
Nang omna peuh lungnopna
Ka nun na'n vang nei
Nong itna kei sungah mei bangin lum den hen
Hallelujah Amin thang hen

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Silh leh ten an leh tui
Nisim hongsik hongvak
A bei theilo hehpihna thupha
Ka kha ading zong hong lui
Thu leh la tawh hong vak
Hi ci bangin hong luang A thupha

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lono hing silsial bang in
Unok paak palh bangin
Ka nuntakna hong no suaksak zel
Pahtawi dingin ki lawm pen
Phat ding in zong hoih pen
Ka khatha hong dim zel hong dim zel
